ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the flight (arrival or departure) */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure/arrival time */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival/departure time */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number assigned by the airline */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the flight */,
  "airline" TEXT /* Airline operating the flight */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal where the flight is assigned */,
  "gate" TEXT /* Gate number for boarding or arrival */,
  "last_status" TEXT /* Last known status of the flight */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is a primary flight record */,
  "flight_guid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for tracking flight */,
  "plane_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the plane assigned to this flight */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight in kilometers */,
  "flight_route_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the flight route */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the flight crew */,
  "baggage_carousel" TEXT /* Baggage carousel number at the arrival terminal */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Scheduled boarding time for the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES flight_crews ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline FOREIGN KEY ("airline") REFERENCES airlines ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_flight_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_route_id") REFERENCES flight_routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_plane_id FOREIGN KEY ("plane_id") REFERENCES planes ("plane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_gate FOREIGN KEY ("gate") REFERENCES gates ("gate_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "planes" (
  "plane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plane */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the plane (e.g., Boeing 737) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the plane */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the plane (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Last maintenance date performed on the plane */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number of the plane */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* The date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* The manufacturer of the plane (e.g., Boeing, Airbus) */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* The year the plane was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline */,
  "code" TEXT /* IATA code for the airline */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airline is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the airline */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gates" (
  "gate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gate */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal associated with the gate */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the terminal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the gate (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the terminal */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the gate in terms of the number of passengers it can handle */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Last time the gate was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gates_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight related to this log entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight at the time of logging */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when this status was recorded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who made the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight route */,
  "origin_city_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the origin city */,
  "destination_city_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the destination city */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the route in minutes */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the route information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_destination_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_origin_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight crew */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the captain */,
  "first_officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the first officer */,
  "cabin_crew" TEXT /* List of cabin crew members */,
  "last_mission" TEXT /* Last mission time */,
  "next_available" TEXT /* Next available time for the crew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminals" (
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal */,
  "terminal_name" TEXT /* Name of the terminal */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the city where the terminal is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the terminal in terms of the number of passengers it can handle */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the terminal information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminals_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
